task: Confirm semantic-model export stays split-form aware on the holdout fixture as the future `semantic/` slices grow.
notes: Holdout confirmation for split-form continuation handling in the semantic model.

task: Confirm the split-form semantic export carries the inspect backbone when reading from an unpack dir.
verification: bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin unpack tests/fixtures/i584-load-form.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/unpack" >/dev/null && uv run formbin semantic-form "$tmpdir/unpack" -o "$tmpdir/form.semantic.json" && python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1], encoding=\"utf-8\")); backbone=data[\"container\"][\"inspect_backbone\"]; assert backbone[\"pointer_links\"] == [{\"source_record_index\": 2, \"target_record_index\": 5, \"target_header_start\": 89120, \"source_label\": \"form\", \"target_label\": \"opaque\"}]; assert backbone[\"record_layout\"][\"total_size\"] == 129805" "$tmpdir/form.semantic.json"'
notes: Holdout confirmation that semantic-form can reuse the unpacked inspect backbone on the split-form fixture.

task: Confirm the split-form semantic export carries the first form.meta slice on the holdout fixture.
verification: bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin semantic-form tests/fixtures/i584-load-form.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/form.semantic.json" && python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1], encoding=\"utf-8\")); meta=data[\"semantic\"][\"form.meta.json\"]; expected_title=\"Обработка \" + chr(34) + \"I584 - Поступление агентских товаров и услуг\" + chr(34); assert meta[\"schema\"] == \"onec-formbin.form-meta.v1\"; assert meta[\"form_name\"] == \"i584-load-form\"; assert meta[\"form_title\"] == expected_title; assert meta[\"root_item_id\"] == \"form-root\"; assert meta[\"flags\"][\"has_explicit_title\"] is True" "$tmpdir/form.semantic.json"'
notes: Holdout confirmation for the first semantic slice on the split-form fixture.

task: Confirm the split-form semantic export carries the bridge strings slice with narrower ownership tags on the holdout fixture.
verification: bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin semantic-form tests/fixtures/i584-load-form.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/form.semantic.json" && python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1], encoding=\"utf-8\")); strings=data[\"semantic\"][\"strings.json\"]; expected_title=\"Обработка \" + chr(34) + \"I584 - Поступление агентских товаров и услуг\" + chr(34); title_items=[item for item in strings[\"items\"] if item[\"role\"] == \"form_title\"]; event_handler_items=[item for item in strings[\"items\"] if item[\"role\"] == \"event_handler\"]; command_title_items=[item for item in strings[\"items\"] if item[\"owner_id\"] == \"command-1-2-2-3-2-1-7-5-4\" and item[\"role\"] == \"command_title\"]; assert strings[\"schema\"] == \"onec-formbin.strings.v1\"; assert len(strings[\"items\"]) == 1329; assert title_items == [{\"id\": \"string-1-1-0-2-1\", \"value\": expected_title, \"owner_kind\": \"form\", \"owner_id\": \"form-root\", \"role\": \"form_title\"}]; assert event_handler_items == [{\"id\": \"string-4-1-2-1\", \"value\": \"ПередОткрытием\", \"owner_kind\": \"event\", \"owner_id\": \"event-4-1-2\", \"role\": \"event_handler\"}]; assert command_title_items == [{\"id\": \"string-1-2-2-3-2-1-7-5-4-2-2-2-1\", \"value\": \"Действия формы восстановить настройки\", \"owner_kind\": \"command\", \"owner_id\": \"command-1-2-2-3-2-1-7-5-4\", \"role\": \"command_title\"}, {\"id\": \"string-1-2-2-3-2-1-7-9-6-4-2-1\", \"value\": \"Действия формы восстановить настройки\", \"owner_kind\": \"command\", \"owner_id\": \"command-1-2-2-3-2-1-7-5-4\", \"role\": \"command_title\"}]" "$tmpdir/form.semantic.json"'
notes: Holdout confirmation that the strings bridge stays additive while tagging current semantic-write-adjacent strings more precisely.

task: Confirm the split-form semantic export carries the conservative form-scope events slice with stable bridge ids on the holdout fixture.
verification: bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin semantic-form tests/fixtures/i584-load-form.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/form.semantic.json" && python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1], encoding=\"utf-8\")); events=data[\"semantic\"][\"events.json\"]; assert events == {\"schema\": \"onec-formbin.events.v1\", \"version\": 1, \"items\": [{\"id\": \"event-4-1-2\", \"name\": \"Перед открытием\", \"handler\": \"ПередОткрытием\", \"scope\": \"form\", \"owner_id\": \"form-root\"}]}" "$tmpdir/form.semantic.json"'
notes: Holdout confirmation that the events bridge stays limited to top-level form events while carrying stable ids.

task: Confirm the split-form semantic export carries the conservative commands slice on the holdout fixture.
verification: bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin semantic-form tests/fixtures/i584-load-form.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/form.semantic.json" && python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1], encoding=\"utf-8\")); commands=data[\"semantic\"][\"commands.json\"]; assert commands[\"schema\"] == \"onec-formbin.commands.v1\"; assert commands[\"version\"] == 1; assert len(commands[\"items\"]) == 7; assert commands[\"items\"][0] == {\"id\": \"command-1-2-2-3-2-1-7-5-4\", \"name\": \"ДействияФормыВосстановитьНастройки\", \"title\": \"Действия формы восстановить настройки\", \"owner_id\": \"form-root\", \"source\": \"ast-root-title-match\"}; assert commands[\"items\"][-1] == {\"id\": \"command-1-2-2-6-5-7-2-1-7-8-4\", \"name\": \"КоманднаяПанельСтекСнятьВсе\", \"title\": \"Снять все\", \"owner_id\": \"form-root\", \"source\": \"ast-root-title-match\"}" "$tmpdir/form.semantic.json"'
notes: Holdout confirmation for the conservative commands bridge on the split-form fixture.

task: Confirm unpack materializes the current semantic bridge slices into `semantic/*.json` on the split-form holdout fixture.
notes: Holdout confirmation that the current semantic bridge export is available as canonical workspace artifacts during unpack.
